description: PRED-105 (46-degree copper coils / cucumber growth >=15% over 14 days) test window closed 2026-04-18; ~24 hours later the dome site STILL labels the prediction 'PENDING -- PROSPECTIVE' on predictions.html. No PASS/FAIL/REFINED/SUSPENDED label has been applied. No new WIN added. Claimed accuracy still 94.5% with denominator confirmed=69, refined=4, prospective=10 (unchanged from baseline). The dome's pattern of leaving an expired prospective prediction unresolved past its declared window is itself the behavior our analyst flagged as worth tracking on the 2026-04-18 poll.
before: PENDING -- PROSPECTIVE | Registered: 2026-04-04 | Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window) -- as of 2026-04-18T11:09 (window expiry day, label still pending)
after: PENDING -- PROSPECTIVE | Registered: 2026-04-04 | Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window) -- as of 2026-04-19T10:55 (~23.7h past window expiry; label still pending; SHA256 3c427a83edaeaf33c884264dedffbedece14378fc766bdffeeac0b4d4d517490 still anchored on-page; no new WIN; denominators unchanged).
notes: This is the 24h-followup to chg-20260418-1109-001. The window has now elapsed without any update from the dome author. Three things to watch in the next 24-48h: (a) silent removal of PRED-105 from predictions.html with no corresponding entry in refined or fail counters (this is the 'silently ignored' failure mode our review tracks in data/uncounted-failures.json); (b) reclassification to a new label (e.g. SUSPENDED, INCONCLUSIVE) without affecting the 94.5% denominator; (c) addition of a WIN-070 with a passing claim, which would be a CRITICAL hard-escalation per Step 5 (any new confirmed WIN). Also note PRED-072 ('TTB Short-Term Fluctuation +/-15 nT at Local Midnight, Test window: This week') is now plausibly inside its window depending on author's intent for 'this week'; analyst should treat this as a soft-pending closure too.
